name: The Samaritan Woman
oracleText:
When the Samaritan Woman enters the battlefield, draw a card and you gain 1 life.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token.
flavorText: "Whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst." — John 4:14
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Giuseppe Passeri's "Christ and the Samaritan Woman at the Well" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Drawer of Living Water

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Giuseppe Passeri, Christ and the Samaritan Woman at the Well
classics.sourceNotes: This is an exact classics match for the Samaritan woman at the well.
